LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Allowed.description: The skies are open to us, as they should be for all who wish to traverse them.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Allowed.label: allowed
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Approved.description: We hold that flying brings us collectively closer to the divine.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Approved.label: approved
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Forbidden.description: To soar through the skies is an affront to our traditions and beliefs.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Horrible.description: We believe taking to the skies disrupts the natural balance.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Horrible.label: horrible
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.description: The purity of spirit is found amongst the clouds; one must experience the freedom of flight regularly.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.label: required
